name: 12q15_MDM2_amplicon_SD
description: 12q15 segmental duplication region centred on MDM2 and the recurrent dedifferentiated-liposarcoma / well-differentiated-liposarcoma amplicon. Tandem and inverted SDs of 10-100 kb seed breakage-fusion-bridge cycles that generate ring chromosomes and giant marker chromosomes.

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SDs of 10-100 kb at ~95% identity; MDM2 amplified 10-100x in liposarcoma alongside CDK4, HMGA2; ring/giant marker chromosomes.
